## Checklist

- [ ] `bash test.sh` passes
- [ ] `cd mcp-server && npm run build` is clean (if the MCP server changed)
- [ ] The app compiles (if `main.m` changed)
- [ ] Engine output strings unchanged, or consumers updated (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No real hostnames, IPs, or personal paths in the diff
